hooks.command:
printf '
  [the office is open]
  Rain on the terminal. The case file is on the desk.
  Another case walks in around now.

'
echo '� case is on the desk. lights off. the door stays unlocked.'
echo '🚬 [asking the blame] The blame is not the answer. The blame is where the answer is.'
echo '🚬 [walking the logs] The logs do not lie. They do, sometimes, omit.'
echo '🚬 [a force push] You are rewriting history. The detective notes the time.'
echo '🚬 a new entry in the file.'
echo '🚬 [a case walks in] Detective is on the clock. The next move is yours.'
